# Subscriptions

Each endpoint requires a minimum [ThetaData](https://www.thetadata.net/) subscription tier on the matching asset class. The tables below map every endpoint to its tier; the same requirement appears as a badge on each reference page.

<TierBadge tier="free" /> available on every tier

<TierBadge tier="standard" /> requires Standard or Pro

For pricing, see [thetadata.net](https://www.thetadata.net/subscribe.html).

## Stock Endpoints

| Endpoint | Free | Value | Standard | Pro |
|---|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|
| **List** |  |  |  |  |
| [Symbols](/reference/stock/list/symbols) | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ |
| [Dates](/reference/stock/list/dates) | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ |
| **Snapshot** |  |  |  |  |
| [OHLC](/reference/stock/snapshot/ohlc) |  | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ |
| [Trade](/reference/stock/snapshot/trade) |  |  | ✓ | ✓ |
| [Quote](/reference/stock/snapshot/quote) |  | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ |
| [Market Value](/reference/stock/snapshot/market-value) |  |  | ✓ | ✓ |
| **History** |  |  |  |  |
| [EOD](/reference/stock/history/eod) | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ |
| [OHLC](/reference/stock/history/ohlc) |  | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ |
| [Trade](/reference/stock/history/trade) |  |  | ✓ | ✓ |
| [Quote](/reference/stock/history/quote) |  | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ |
| [Trade Quote](/reference/stock/history/trade-quote) |  |  | ✓ | ✓ |
| **At-Time** |  |  |  |  |
| [Trade](/reference/stock/at-time/trade) |  |  | ✓ | ✓ |
| [Quote](/reference/stock/at-time/quote) |  | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ |
| **History** |  |  |  |  |
| [OHLC Range](/reference/stock/history/ohlc-range) |  | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ |

## Streaming

Real-time streaming requires a **Standard** subscription or higher on the matching asset class. Per-contract quote, trade, and open-interest streams are available on Standard and Pro; full-stream subscriptions follow the same requirement, with contract limits depending on tier.

::: tip
For current tier definitions, see the vendor's [Subscriptions article](https://docs.thetadata.us/Articles/Getting-Started/Subscriptions.html).
:::
